response.original_title: How Do I Talk Directly on Robinhood? (: 1-863-338-2360)
response.overview: Robinhood does not offer a public direct phone number for general support calls (: 1-863-338-2360)  Instead, you can talk to a real support agent through the app or website (: 1-863-338-2360)  Most “direct talking” happens through a callback request system (: 1-863-338-2360)  Talk to Robinhood Support via App (: 1-863-338-2360)  Open the Robinhood app and log in (: 1-863-338-2360)  Tap the Account or Menu icon (: 1-863-338-2360)  Go to Help or Support (: 1-863-338-2360)  Select your issue from the list (: 1-863-338-2360)  Tap Contact Support or Request a Callback (: 1-863-338-2360)  A Robinhood representative will call you back (: 1-863-338-2360)
response.title: How Do I Talk Directly on Robinhood? (: 1-863-338-2360)
